title: triticum sativum var. aestivum
intro: Triticum sativum var. aestivum, commonly known as common wheat, is a domesticated plant species belonging to the grass family and is widely cultivated for its edible grains. It has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of consuming common wheat include providing essential nutrients, fiber, and energy, as well as supporting healthy digestion and bowel function. Common wheat can be prepared into a variety of herbal remedies, including wheat grass juice, wheat germ oil, and flour-based supplements, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
